name: The Transformation Apocalypse
description:
UPDATE: I am trying to make the narrator accept locations that aren't listed so it will improvise a transformation for you. In my attempts, it can be finicky or it can work flawlessly. Use Memory if you have a specific direction you want to go.

The whole world is changing around you. People are transforming in the streets, running in search of a safe place where they will not be affected. You should start running too, you have no clue what you might end up as if you just stay home.

Below are all the locations that you can currently explore. Some of these may contain a little surprise. All of them contain TG if your character is male, a few rare of them contain mythical creatures, and almost half of them contain WG, even in places you wouldn't expect, I just can't help it, it's my bias. I would love to add more, the format for them is very intuitive, but I'm scratching my head for ideas since I got to combine a location for each of them, and I rather like my format, even if I could just leave it more free-form.

1. The Mall
- Food Court (SSBBW)
- Clothing Store (Socialite)
- Arcade (Nerdy)

2. The Park
- Running Path (Runner)
- Forest Trail (Foxy)
- Pond (Mermaid.)

3. The Office Building
- IT Department (Computer Gal)
- Break Room (Lazy Worker)
- Secretary Desk (Sexy Secretary)

4. The Nightlife District
- Club (Party-Happy)
creator: paltanosaurus
